pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 17 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
Upgrade the jsoup library from version 1.14.3 to 1.15.3.
Upgrade the hutool-all library from version 5.8.0 to 5.8.21.
Configure Maven build to filter resources, allowing property substitution in configuration files like application.yml.

src/main/java/META-INF/MANIFEST.MF.general_idea: Update the Manifest-Version attribute to match the project release version.

src/main/resources/config.properties.general_idea: Update the base index URL to point to a new domain for the novel scraping source.
Update the search request URL to match the new domain structure.
Change the save path from a Windows-specific absolute path to a Unix-style relative path.
Introduce a configuration property to specify the file extension for downloaded content.
Significantly increase the minimum and maximum delay intervals between requests to be more polite to the server.
Add a version property placeholder to be resolved during the build process.
